hero.title: Secure every payment. Pay only when the work is approved.
hero.subtitle: The universal decentralized escrow platform for freelancers, creators, and businesses.

step1.title: 1. Secure Deposit
step1.desc: The client deposits funds into a tamper-proof smart contract.

step2.title: 2. Work Delivered
step2.desc: The provider completes the mission with peace of mind, knowing the funds are locked.

step3.title: 3. Release
step3.desc: Upon approval, the funds are instantly transferred to the provider.

security.title: Security & Transparency
security.subtitle: Our architecture is designed to ensure that no one (not even JoobEscrow) can access your funds without your consent.

auditSection.title: Independent Audit
auditSection.desc: Our contracts have been rigorously audited by independent experts to guarantee the absence of flaws or backdoors.

contractSection.title: Verified Public Contract
contractSection.desc: The source code of our escrow is public and verified on BscScan.
